sql_array: CREATE TABLE WS.SOAPDEMO.TESTTABLE (id INT, value VARCHAR(100));
SELECT id, value FROM WS.SOAPDEMO.TESTTABLE WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE WS.SOAPDEMO.TESTTABLE SET value = 'updated_value' WHERE id = 1;

SELECT xpath_eval ('//CallReturn/text()', xml_tree_doc (soap_client (url=>'https://example.com/SecureWebServices', operation=>'AddInt', parameters=>vector (vector ('a', 'int'), 2, vector ('b', 'int'), 3), auth_type=>'key', ticket=>xenc_key_inst_create ('Sample Key'), security_type=>'encrypt', target_namespace=>'http://temp.uri/', soap_action=>'"http://temp.uri/#AddInt"')));
